title: Who is Bricks & Minifigs CEO? Ammon McNeff faces tough Coffeezilla questions over missing LEGO Star Wars collection
summary_full: Coffeezilla’s latest investigation into the Bricks & Minifigs controversy included a direct conversation with CEO Ammon McNeff about a missing LEGO Star Wars collection linked to the Salem, Oregon, store. McNeff said corporate did not know about a spreadsheet tracking the collection. Coffeezilla also revealed documents estimating the collection’s value at roughly $107,000 instead of $200,000.
